data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Apple uses microservices for modular deployments and scalable application management.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Apple employs a global CDN to ensure fast content delivery and reduce latency.
data.technical_spec: Edge servers, caching strategies, DNS routing.

data.title: Redundant Server Infrastructure
data.description: The website is backed by a redundant server infrastructure to ensure high availability.
data.technical_spec: Load balancing, failover systems, distributed storage.

data.title: Cloud-Native Integration
data.description: Integration with cloud services for scalability and flexibility.
data.technical_spec: Cloud platforms, serverless functions, orchestration tools.

data.title: Responsive Web Design
data.description: The architecture supports dynamic resizing for various screen sizes and devices.
data.technical_spec: CSS media queries, fluid grids, flexible images.
